Why ARMH & Co

Built for UAE Businesses

01

FTA Registered Tax Agents

We are registered with the Federal Tax Authority — meaning we can represent your business directly in all FTA correspondence and audits.

02

Deep UAE Regulatory Expertise

From Dubai Mainland to DMCC, DIFC, ADGM, JAFZA and all major free zones — we know every zone's specific requirements.

03

Zero Penalty Track Record

Three consecutive years with zero FTA penalties across all clients. That's the standard we hold ourselves — and your business — to.

Staying Ahead of Compliance

UAE Compliance Coverage

VAT — 5% Standard Rate

Active since Jan 2018. Mandatory above AED 375,000 taxable supplies.

Corporate Tax — 9%

Active from June 2023 FY. First AED 375,000 at 0%. Free zone qualifying income at 0%.

Economic Substance Regulations (ESR)

Annual notifications and reports for regulated sector entities.

Ultimate Beneficial Ownership (UBO)

Mandatory register submissions for all UAE-incorporated entities.

What We Offer

Our Services

Bookkeeping & Management Accounts (IFRS)

IFRS-compliant bookkeeping with management accounts tailored for UAE business requirements.

Learn more

VAT Registration & Filing

Complete VAT registration, periodic filing, and FTA correspondence management.

Learn more

UAE Corporate Tax (9% Regime)

Corporate tax compliance including registration, filing, and strategic tax planning.

Learn more

Payroll & WPS Compliance

Full payroll management with Wage Protection System (WPS) compliance across all Emirates.

Learn more

Free Zone Accounting

Specialized accounting for DMCC, DIFC, JAFZA, ADGM, and all major UAE free zones.

Learn more

Financial Reporting & Forecasting

Comprehensive financial statements, cash flow forecasting, and budget planning.

Learn more

CFO Advisory (Part-Time)

Strategic financial guidance from experienced CFOs on a flexible, part-time basis.

Learn more

ESR Reporting

Economic Substance Regulations compliance including notifications and annual reports.

Learn more

UBO Register Maintenance

Ultimate Beneficial Ownership register maintenance and timely FTA submissions.

Learn more

Free Zone Coverage

We Serve Every Major UAE Free Zone

DMCCDIFCJAFZAADGMSAIF ZoneRAK ICCKIZADDubai Silicon OasisAbu Dhabi MainlandDubai MainlandSharjahNorthern Emirates

Dubai Mainland & Free Zones

Complete accounting and compliance for Dubai Mainland businesses and all Dubai free zones including DMCC, DIFC, JAFZA, and Dubai Silicon Oasis.

Abu Dhabi & Northern Emirates

Full-service accounting for Abu Dhabi Mainland, ADGM, and all Northern Emirates including Sharjah, RAK, and Fujairah.

Transparent Pricing

Starter

AED 999/mo

All prices exclude 5% UAE VAT

  • Monthly bookkeeping (IFRS)
  • VAT registration & filing
  • Corporate tax compliance
  • Basic payroll (up to 5 employees)
  • ESR notification
  • UBO register maintenance
  • Email support

Growth

AED 1,999/mo

All prices exclude 5% UAE VAT

  • Everything in Starter

  • Financial forecasting
  • Payroll (up to 20 employees)
